Thermal insulation and soundproofing, Secured door This property in Tanger, Vue sur mer Au quatrième étage sans ascenseur, je le mentionne clairement dans les détails de la publicité pour éviter de perdre mon temps et le temps des clients dans des aperçus de terrain inutiles . located 90100 COMP DIAR EL BOUGHAZ IMM L2 ETG 4 N 16 GZENAYA TANGER, offers a spacious 108 m² living area ideal for individuals or small families. Situated on the fourth floor, this apartment benefits from an elevator, ensuring easy access. It boasts a private terrace with stunning sea views, providing a serene outdoor escape. The apartment is over 5 years old but well-maintained with features such as a full kitchen equipped with an oven, and double glazing for added comfort. A reinforced door and security system add to the safety aspects of this home. Inside, the property includes one well-sized bedroom and a bathroom, alongside abundant communal spaces that allow for flexible use and decoration. Shared amenities enhance the living experience, including access to and satellite. Residents can enjoy good connectivity within the neighborhood and beyond, with local shops, cafes, and essential services all easily reachable. The central location in Tanger makes it a convenient starting point for exploring the city's rich cultural scene, with historical sites and local attractions just a short drive or public transport ride away.
